Spectrum Sharing Sandbox (S3)
A 6 GHz and CBRS Data Platform for Spectrum Coexistence

Data Admin

Build and edit the dataset configuration. Changes live in your browser only — use Download Configuration to export a replacement JSON file for the repo.

Unlisted tool. This page is not linked from the navigation. Edits made here are not saved to the server — they exist only in this tab until you download the JSON.

Edit dataset

Date ranges

Use the format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS±HHMM (e.g. 2025-08-12 12:34:56-0400).

Data types

Type a value and press Enter to add. Click a chip to remove it.

Tags

Freeform. Type and press Enter to add.
